justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted the user's request for "around 4 PM on June 13th" as a 16:00 to 17:00 slot on June 13th.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently gathered all necessary information and booked the appointment in three turns without any redundant questions or API calls.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent quickly understanding the user's request and confirming the booking.
